company_descriptor: Specialty coffee roaster & neighborhood cafe · Asheville, NC · direct-to-consumer beans
company_summary: You have a strong product and a loyal in-person following, but you monetize only the counter while every competitor sells online. Your farm-level transparency is a story none of them can tell as credibly, and it never leaves the cafe.

limitations.title: No online subscription
limitations.detail: Recurring DTC revenue is left on the table while all three rivals sell beyond the counter.

limitations.title: No content engine
limitations.detail: Zero brew guides or origin stories, so you are invisible for searches Fathom already ranks for.

recommendations.title: Launch a single-origin subscription
recommendations.detail: Put a meet-the-farm card in every box to turn transparency into recurring revenue.

recommendations.title: Build a brew-guide content hub
recommendations.detail: Target the exact keywords competitors already rank for.

positioning_angle: Most coffee says single origin; you show them the farm and deliver it to their door.
